ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., image, video, document) */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the asset */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the asset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the asset belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the asset (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to a thumbnail image of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, contributor, viewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the asset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date this version was uploaded */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded this version */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL to the file of this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset this metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., description, tags) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metadata value (e.g., string, integer, date) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_metadata_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset this comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is resolved */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* JSON array of user IDs mentioned in the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES asset_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_comments_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset this task belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "task" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the task was created */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date the task was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_tasks_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_workflow" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset this workflow belongs to */,
  "workflow_status" TEXT /* Current status of the workflow (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the workflow status was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the workflow entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the workflow entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_workflow_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset this analytics belongs to */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the asset has been viewed */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the asset has been downloaded */,
  "last_viewed" TEXT /* Date the asset was last viewed */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the asset has received */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the asset has been shared */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* A score representing the overall engagement with the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_analytics_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user-role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user-role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
